chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.D-67 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of bail application 14-01-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for applicants. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. ****** At the very outset, learned Additional P.G submits that almost all PWs have been examined by the prosecution before the trial Court except I.O who remains to be examined. Hence, grant or refusal of bail will prejudice the case of either side. He therefore submits that it would be appropriate for the applicants to proceed with the trial instead of proceeding with this bail application. When confronted, learned counsel for applicants seeks disposal of instant bail application; however, submits that prosecution may be directed to procure attendance of its witnesses and then trial Court may be directed to conclude the trial within shortest possible time. The proposal so advanced is not opposed by learned Additional P.G for the State. Accordingly, instant bail application is disposed of. The trial Court is hereby directed to expedite the trial and conclude it within one month’s time under intimation to this Court. Office to communicate copy of this order to the trial Court for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
